dataIdInfo.idPurp: This layer contains 77 districts of Nepal. Prior to the promulgation of constitution of Nepal in 2015, there were only 75 districts. The constitution has divided Nawalparasi and Rukum districts each into two parts. The eastern portion of the then districts are labeled as 76th and 77th district.
dataIdInfo.idAbs: This layer is downloaded from the national geo portal of Department of Survey of Nepal as free resource. The layer had only two meaningfull fields State Code (Province Code) and District Name, later District code and Province Name was joined using the layer prepared by MOFALD during the restructuring of local levels in 2074BS.
dataIdInfo.idCredit: Department of Survey Ministry of Federal Affairs and General Administration Metadata and Layer Join Maintain by Shravan Kumar Ghimire (shravanghimire@gmail.com)

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
